items.name: Pi Beanie
items.description:
Limited Reward for participating in the game, "Do You Think You Can Math."

Requirements:

1. Like and favorite the game, and join the group.

2. Complete all 3 current stages of mathematics: Elementary, Middle, and High school.

3.  Obtain a score of 400 in Math Blitz, a speedy math game to test your fundamentals.

4. Obtain a playtime of 120 minutes.
